name: paper-reading-toolkit
description: Codex toolkit for one-click academic paper reading setup, deep-dive Memory First retrieval, Markdown formatting, and Academic Research archiving.

interface.shortDescription: Read papers with deep-dive and Obsidian.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin that uses deep-dive as the paper-reading entrypoint, with built-in Memory First retrieval, clearer Markdown output, and Academic Research note routing.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-dive to read this paper and connect it to my notes.
Archive this paper discussion to Obsidian Academic Research.
Use beautify-output to polish this paper summary into clear Markdown.
